#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="lang" value="en"}]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="meta" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="charset" value="utf-8"}]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Acme Cloud"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="header" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Acme Cloud"
        element ns=html local="nav" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/features"}]
            "Features"
          element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/pricing"}]
            "Pricing"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="section" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="h2" attrs=[]
            "Ship faster"
          element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
            "Deploy globally in minutes."
          element ns=html local="button" attrs=[]
            "Start free"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="footer" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="small" attrs=[]
          "\u{A9} 2026 Acme"
      "\n"
    "\n"
